extracted.title: Operationally Available Capacity for April 2026 Revised
extracted.description:
Download File: TSouthAprilRev.pdf
Operationally Available Capacity for April 2026.
T North
Aitken Creek Lateral Capacity
April 1, 2026: 419,800 GJ
Sunset Creek Interconnect Capacity
April 20 - 27, 2026: 0 GJ
T South
Please see attached the T South estimated operationally available capacities for April 2026.
These capacities are to be used in conjunction with the Weekly Outage Schedule. A critical notice will be published closer to the time of the scheduled work to confirm the capacities.
If you have questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.
